title: Console Edition Pak
description: Changes the Modern ingame music to the classics from Minecraft: Console Edition
body:
Ever wanted the new, modern Lena Raine music of 1.19.3 to go back to the original C418 music of Minecraft Xbox 360 Edition (AKA Console Edition)? Well this solves all your problems.

Replaces all music of Minecraft with C418's original Alpha and Beta albums that were made for the game, with some exceptions being the Pigstep, "5", and Otherworld music discs.

MUSIC SOURCES
-------------------------
Main Soundtrack (ALL VERSIONS):
C418 Alpha: https://open.spotify.com/album/3Gt7rOjcZQoHCfnKl5AkK7
C418 Beta: https://open.spotify.com/album/7CYDRyFCKtAYJBSpfovLyX

Replacement Discs (Main Pak Only):
Lena Raine Pigstep: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B2KJEEa3Sns
Samuel Åberg "5": https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I-sH53vXP2A
Lena Raine Otherside: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3UKRbLHdfGo
NOTE: If you do not wish for these to be replaced, just use the No Replacement Pak!

Basically a sequel to my previous Pak: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/musicpak
